'''Tharkos''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Tharkos system/Legends|Tharkos system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was the headquarters of [[Millennium Astro-Engineering]].<ref name="The Flight of the Falcon" /> The planet was [[Battle of Tharkos|attacked]] by the [[Stenax]] during the [[Stenax Massacres]] of [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]].<ref name="Sanbra">{{GamerCite|1|The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Marvel Series}}</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
